title: Crash following syntax error on DETACH
description:
drh added on 2016-11-11 03:36:03:
The following (syntactically incorrect) statement causes a NULL pointer
deference in SQLite 3.15.1:
DETACH x IS #1;
The problem was introduced by parser changes associated with the introduction
of the row-value logic in check-in [ddb5f0558c445699] on 2016-09-07.  The
problem first appeared in SQLite 3.15.0.
key_bug_features: Syntactically incorrect DETACH statement causes NULL pointer dereference
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, value REAL CHECK(value >= 0));
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) VALUES ('test2', NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
